{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201820A2306EC51534DD598158"}"},"total":558},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7484720087894197054","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！！！啊啊啊我看到这个名字的时候第一反应是啊真的吗我们省拟要崛起了？然后发现其实是很多动漫的同人作品其实我有点拒绝，毕竟曾经看过一本也是有很多作品的同人文，那本乱的我脑子疼，但这本还好了，主线很清晰，主要角色的部分写的很好，以至于我可以完全不在乎那些动漫情节啊啊啊看爽了，我从昨天下午一直看到今天凌晨直接看完，能不能多更一点啊呜呜呜呜"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742690690,"group_id":"7471598533913611289","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无言召风雪","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3Mt8VmNj0BfBdN03lfVg7A=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e27164efd5a540bc85a5332b77fc67ee~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702532&x-signature=aBbnYskVuxIkG98dCaNo7oH18GI%3D","user_id":"22102178608","user_name":"郁绛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"22102178608","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471598533913611289","book_info":{"abstract":"【正文无cp，主名柯，文野+咒回+K的王权者，群穿，轻松救赎向】
tomato会社首发的漫画《和平在樱花》终于上线了！
所有读者都知道，这篇新漫将会把正在更新的三大漫画联合到一起，组成一个新的次元世界。
于是，各大漫画ip粉自立阵营，准备在开篇为自推大展身手，可他们却没想到会看见——
东京，最高的电视塔上，少女扎着粉褐色侧马尾，迎风站立在咒术界最强的面前，笑容恣意：
“五条先生，好久不见啊～我是东京，对没错，就是你脚下的这座城市！”
横滨码头。
黑色长发的少年踩在一堆黑手党叠起的人山上，冷眼看见赶来救场的港口“双黑”，含着嘲讽：
“你们首领说这是他的横滨？我怎么不知道自己何时成黑手党的所有物了？”
京都，黑衣组织们正在酒吧里进行新的交易，却被人给截胡在了原地。
踩着木屐的银发青年轻笑着抬着折扇抵在波本颔下，似在吟诗般提醒道：
“真是抱歉，我的城市……今后可不允许这样的黑色交易出现了……”
并盛、大阪、八原……无数自称为这座城市本身的家伙来到读者们的视野中，他们肆意张扬，让读者对这些角色又爱又恨。
但他们不知道的是，这些城市背后，其实只是四个倒霉蛋大学生为了生存，每天起早贪黑的扮演成果。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o743cd635f0bba765dcba2ff9bb586477~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"鹿山雪","author_id":"","book_id":"7471598533913611289","book_name":"综漫：保护城市，人人有责","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":461,"name":"群穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=461&name=群穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7471733746815730201","read_count":"13541","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"466539"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"196","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,无CP,群穿,HE,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cac8ef4d99000306948f3104ea64c400~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365900&x-signature=%2FkrSDTrwu44mTBlarJAcRKZATQ0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3292394142307056","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"71"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201820A2306EC51534DD598158"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18588,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2690},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7494872525715833625","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书设定很新颖，正文无CP，主名柯文，文野+咒回+K的王权者，是群穿。是大学女寝四个室友到综漫世界当城市意志，四个室友扮演的男女比例是1:1。①女主：鹿七(日名：源鹿七，城市意志：高天原)是团宠，前期扮演值比较低，但不代表弱 ②大姐/寝室长：林白一(日名：月见里白，城市意志：京都)对小七很温柔，很聪明有逻辑 ③二姐：梦芽(日名：小松原梦芽，城市意志：东京)很单纯，活泼可爱 ④三姐：裴凌(日名：黑川凌，城市意志：横滨)酷酷的，很帅。文章有逻辑，思路很清晰。希望作者大大继续加油！₍˄·͈༝·͈˄*₎◞ ̑̑(个人观点，每个人感受都不同)","text_exts":[{"e":30,"s":28,"text":"王权","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8E%8B%E6%9D%83&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774181900DD598158%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227494872525715833625%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227471598533913611289%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8E%8B%E6%9D%83%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745040463,"group_id":"7471598533913611289","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2OUY4pyyRPgyZZMDMGta1ADQ8q0JKHIlOxVrNGuojjk","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fab7e51e697e4df797a7a54d662ac727~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703935&x-signature=Gh6jLYYvHgyGqUuPsVaa34KmiU8%3D","user_id":"2560103933553408","user_name":"Korly"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2560103933553408","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471598533913611289","book_info":{"abstract":"【正文无cp，主名柯，文野+咒回+K的王权者，群穿，轻松救赎向】
